testcase.name: testLoginSuccess
testcase.system-out: 09:58:50.563 [main] INFO com.health.patient.service.impl.PatientServiceImpl -- Patient login attempt for email: john@example.com 09:58:50.634 [main] INFO com.health.patient.service.impl.PatientServiceImpl -- Patient login successful for email: john@example.com
testcase.system-err: WARNING: A Java agent has been loaded dynamically (C:\Users\msysu\.m2\repository\net\bytebuddy\byte-buddy-agent\1.14.8\byte-buddy-agent-1.14.8.jar) WARNING: If a serviceability tool is in use, please run with -XX:+EnableDynamicAgentLoading to hide this warning WARNING: If a serviceability tool is not in use, please run with -Djdk.instrument.traceUsage for more information WARNING: Dynamic loading of agents will be disallowed by default in a future release

testcase.name: testLoginUserNotFound
testcase.system-out: 09:58:50.733 [main] INFO com.health.patient.service.impl.PatientServiceImpl -- Patient login attempt for email: john@example.com 09:58:50.733 [main] WARN com.health.patient.service.impl.PatientServiceImpl -- Login failed: Patient not found with email: john@example.com 09:58:50.733 [main] ERROR com.health.patient.service.impl.PatientServiceImpl -- Patient login failed java.lang.RuntimeException: Invalid credentials at com.health.patient.service.impl.PatientServiceImpl.lambda$login$0(PatientServiceImpl.java:79) at java.base/java.util.Optional.orElseThrow(Optional.java:403) at com.health.patient.service.impl.PatientServiceImpl.login(PatientServiceImpl.java:77) at testcase.name: testGetProfileNotFound

com.health.patient.service.impl.PatientServiceImpl -- Failed to fetch patient profile java.lang.RuntimeException: Patient not found at testcase.name: testRegisterDuplicateEmail
testcase.system-out: 09:58:50.843 [main] INFO com.health.patient.service.impl.PatientServiceImpl -- Attempting to register patient with email: john@example.com 09:58:50.851 [main] WARN com.health.patient.service.impl.PatientServiceImpl -- Registration failed: Email already registered: john@example.com 09:58:50.851 [main] ERROR com.health.patient.service.impl.PatientServiceImpl -- Patient registration failed java.lang.RuntimeException: Email already registered at com.health.patient.service.impl.PatientServiceImpl.register(PatientServiceImpl.java:40) at com.health.patient.service.PatientServiceImplTest.lambda$testRegisterDuplicateEmail$0(PatientServiceImplTest.java:83) at org.junit.jupiter.api.AssertThrows.assertThrows(AssertThrows.java:53) at testcase.name: testLoginInvalidPassword
testcase.system-out: 09:58:50.893 [main] INFO com.health.patient.service.impl.PatientServiceImpl -- Patient login attempt for email: john@example.com 09:58:50.894 [main] WARN com.health.patient.service.impl.PatientServiceImpl -- Login failed: Invalid password for email: john@example.com 09:58:50.894 [main] ERROR com.health.patient.service.impl.PatientServiceImpl -- Patient login failed java.lang.RuntimeException: Invalid credentials at com.health.patient.service.impl.PatientServiceImpl.login(PatientServiceImpl.java:84) at testcase.name: testRegisterSuccess
testcase.system-out: 09:58:50.913 [main] INFO com.health.patient.service.impl.PatientServiceImpl -- Attempting to register patient with email: john@example.com 09:58:50.913 [main] INFO com.health.patient.service.impl.PatientServiceImpl -- Patient registered successfully with id: 1
